hero_headline: Specialists in All Aspects of Durham Home Renovations and Remodeling
about_copy: With over 30 years of experience in the construction industry, we have built up a great reputation for excellence, integrity, dependability and strong project management capabilities.
mission: Customer satisfaction is our priority. CCR Renovations at all times treats our clients and their property with respect and ensures that the working site remains a safe and healthy environment.

team_members.name: Stuart
team_members.bio: As founder and site foreman of CCR Renovations, Stuart oversees every aspect of the construction side of our business.

team_members.name: Matt
team_members.bio: Matt manages all aspects of project estimation; from the initial phone call to the signing date.

team_members.name: Conor
team_members.bio: With an in-depth understanding of the industry and a hands-on background, Conor ensures each project is executed with precision from start to finish.

team_members.name: Tara
team_members.bio: With a keen eye for aesthetics and years of project experience, Tara helps refine your style, offering direction on layouts, materials, and finishes.

services.name: Basements
services.description: A finished basement/conversion will transform your living space and the way you use your entire home.

services.name: Kitchens
services.description: We will assist in every aspect of your project, working alongside bespoke cabinetry companies, to tailor-make your dream kitchen.

services.name: Bathrooms
services.description: Whether you are looking to renovate your existing bathroom or create a new space in a basement or new build, CCR Renovations can oblige.

services.name: Decks
services.description: From the smallest yard project to a large landscaped theme with custom 2 storey deck, we can help you convert your ideas into reality.

services.name: Home Additions
services.description: CCR Renovations know that extra room(s) will not only maximise the enjoyment of your home for you and your family, but will also unlock its hidden potential.

testimonials.author: Sonia, Toronto
testimonials.quote: Thank you to CCR Renovations for totally executing my vision to a T. There was nothing CCR wouldn't do to make sure the stain on the stairs was Perfect!

testimonials.author: Steve, Whitby
testimonials.quote: CCR Renovations did an outstanding job, paying particular attention to detail and quality of material and workmanship. The end product was simply AWESOME.

testimonials.author: Syd & Amanda, Oshawa
testimonials.quote: The bathroom is everything we wanted from the very beginning, and we couldn't be happier. We wouldn't think twice about hiring CCR for future projects.

portfolio.title: Melissa and Steve's Eclectic, Bold & Beautiful Main Floor!
portfolio.description: CCR Renovations is excited to share with you our recent bold renovation! This family really wanted to showcase their own style by adding all their unique elements from the tile transitions to the one of a kind rabbit lamp!

portfolio.title: Arielle & Sean's Exceptional Whitby Backsplit
portfolio.description: CCR Renovations is delighted to share their most recent finished project! This was a substantial renovation for a family in Whitby who needed to update their space to make it their own!

portfolio.title: Mel & Andrew's Brooklin Beauty
portfolio.description: CCR Renovations are proud to present this substantial renovation project undertaken for an awesome Brooklin couple.

portfolio.title: Mike & Virginia's Multi Level Home Showcase
portfolio.description: CCR Renovations are proud to showcase this extensive home renovation project that we have recently completed.

portfolio.title: Jiun & Bob's Whitby Main Floor Renovation
portfolio.description: Our Whitby clients wanted to breathe new life into their dated kitchen and have a modern space.

portfolio.title: Lynda & Craig's Blackstock Entire Home Renovation
portfolio.description: CCR Renovations took on this mammoth task and completely transformed this home.

why_choose_us.title: Over 30 Years of Experience
why_choose_us.description: CCR Renovations were proud and privileged to have taken part in the TV shows over the past 4 years.

why_choose_us.title: Trusted Local Reputation
why_choose_us.description: Built on integrity and dependability, CCR Renovations has earned the trust of homeowners across Whitby through consistent, quality workmanship.

why_choose_us.title: Full-Service Renovations
why_choose_us.description: From basements and kitchens to decks and home additions, we handle every aspect of your project under one roof.

process_steps.title: Consultation
process_steps.description: Discuss your renovation needs and vision.

process_steps.title: Design Phase
process_steps.description: Develop a detailed plan and designs.

process_steps.title: Construction
process_steps.description: Execute the renovation with precision and care.

process_steps.title: Final Review
process_steps.description: Walk through the completed project with you.

values.title: Integrity
values.description: We conduct our business with honesty.

values.title: Dependability
values.description: You can rely on us for timely and efficient service.
